programme.title: Duplicity
programme.desc: When a boyfriend tricks Lucy (Scarlett Johansson) into delivering a briefcase to a supposed business contact, the once-carefree student is abducted by thugs who intend to turn her into a drug mule. She is surgically implanted with a package containing a powerful chemical, but it leaks into her system, giving her superhuman abilities, including telekinesis and telepathy. With her former captors in pursuit, Lucy seeks out a neurologist (Morgan Freeman), who she hopes will be able to help her.

She is surgically implanted with a package containing a powerful chemical, but it leaks into her system, giving her superhuman abilities, including telekinesis and telepathy. With her former captors in pursuit, Lucy seeks out a neurologist (Morgan Freeman), who she hopes will be able to help her.

programme.title: Victory by Submission
programme.desc: When British agent Harry Palmer loses his job because the Cold War is over, a Russian boss approaches him and tells Harry of his plan for Russia's future, which is threatened because a deadly biochemical weapon called the Red Death, has been stolen from him and he'll pay Harry to retrieve it.

programme.title: Marvel Black Panther Trouble in Wakanda
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane’s mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja’s various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: Laugh & Learn
programme.desc: Meet the WellieWishers™ - a sweet and lively group of friends who play in their whimsical garden. While the girls play, they learn about the natural world and experience the magic of their imaginations. Their sometimes silly, sometimes serious adventures allow them to explore the wonders of their garden - where all living things thrive and grow, along with creativity, friendship, and kindness.

Their sometimes silly, sometimes serious adventures allow them to explore the wonders of their garden - where all living things thrive and grow, along with creativity, friendship, and kindness.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: ¿Sabías que, si atrapas un trol, este puede concederte un deseo? Resulta que Aloysius el trol ha quedado atrapado en una de las pitufitrampas de Gargamel. Pitufo Colérico le libera y, como recompensa, consigue que los demás Pitufos satisfagan todos sus caprichos. Esto acarrea un montón de problemas para los Pitufos, ya que los Pitufitos, en ocasiones, piden cosas que no son buenas para ellos… ni tampoco para los demás.

Esto acarrea un montón de problemas para los Pitufos, ya que los Pitufitos, en ocasiones, piden cosas que no son buenas para ellos… ni tampoco para los demás.

Esto acarrea un montón de problemas para los Pitufos, ya que los Pitufitos, en ocasiones, piden cosas que no son buenas para ellos… ni tampoco para los demás.

Esto acarrea un montón de problemas para los Pitufos, ya que los Pitufitos, en ocasiones, piden cosas que no son buenas para ellos… ni tampoco para los demás.

Esto acarrea un montón de problemas para los Pitufos, ya que los Pitufitos, en ocasiones, piden cosas que no son buenas para ellos… ni tampoco para los demás.

programme.title: Robocar POLI
programme.desc: As they explore the world in all its seasons, Stella and Sam have wild adventures and comical mishaps. They make friends and discover many things - especially about themselves. If Sam is bold enough to rescue Fred from the sprinkler, then maybe he really can be brave enough to have a sleepover in the backyard tent. Every day is a new adventure, and Stella and Sam share the joy of discovering that they have what it takes to face the biggest adventure of all... growing up.

If Sam is bold enough to rescue Fred from the sprinkler, then maybe he really can be brave enough to have a sleepover in the backyard tent. Every day is a new adventure, and Stella and Sam share the joy of discovering that they have what it takes to face the biggest adventure of all... growing up.

If Sam is bold enough to rescue Fred from the sprinkler, then maybe he really can be brave enough to have a sleepover in the backyard tent. Every day is a new adventure, and Stella and Sam share the joy of discovering that they have what it takes to face the biggest adventure of all... growing up.

If Sam is bold enough to rescue Fred from the sprinkler, then maybe he really can be brave enough to have a sleepover in the backyard tent. Every day is a new adventure, and Stella and Sam share the joy of discovering that they have what it takes to face the biggest adventure of all... growing up.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Akitoki, Hoji's ancestor is on a journey to offer the Hojo family heirloom, the Kenkon Naginata, a demon sword that brings disaster. Inuyasha and the gang travel accompany him. People who are after the Kenkon Naginata appear.
